query: SELECT deviceId, COUNT(DISTINCT id) as user_count FROM users WHERE deviceId IS NOT NULL GROUP BY deviceId HAVING user_count > 1 LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user p1iERkZxRv8XeMu.root --database EorxrxCPNFVtGo7gjBVrJr --execute SELECT deviceId, COUNT(DISTINCT id) as user_count FROM users WHERE deviceId IS NOT NULL GROUP BY deviceId HAVING user_count > 1 LIMIT 10;
